ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the custom event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_payload" TEXT /* Opaque JSON payload in the format of escaped JSON string */,
  "requires_context" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event must be sent with context */,
  "correlation_token" TEXT /* Token correlating this event to a directive */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was sent */,
  "received_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was received */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., pending, processing, failed, success) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event property */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the event property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the event property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_properties_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "last_seen_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last seen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_events" (
  "device_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-event pair */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_info ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_info ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_context" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "context_key" TEXT /* Key of the context information */,
  "context_value" TEXT /* Value of the context information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_context_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "related_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_correlations_related_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_correlations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
